sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zan a van siang en ding ka khua dak leh,
Vanpi nung ah a pil Pasian om veh;
Aksite amau mun ciat ah belh a,
Van dumpi puan in silh sak khin zo ta.
Vanglian Pasian lamdang zen mahsi cia,
Vanpi'n hong bia napi'n hong phawk si cia,
Tel zawh ding hilo lamdang nong itzia,
Vanglian Pasian lamdang zen mah si cia.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Gamla pek ah ni kha aksi ka mu,
Dem zawh loh hehpihna Pasian ka mu;
Meii tung tuangin hong kipulak ding hi,
ua kan a lamdang zawom lo ding pi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lawp cinten in vantung ka en to a,
A bawlsa khempeuh te lamdang ka sa;
Banghang peuhmah in kei hong phawk zenzen,
A tapa sing tungah hong khai zenzen.
